_comment: Declarative workflow definition for school-administration. Builds school/system-level leadership tools — walkthrough instruments, implementation plans, progress-monitoring systems — focused on concrete observable indicators.
description: Leadership tool: initiative analysis → observable indicators → reading-level check → quality gate

steps.note: Ensure walkthrough look-fors and plan text are concise and readable for school-wide audiences

note: School-administration operates at school/system scope (implementation monitoring), not individual classroom level. Walkthrough tools here are NOT formal personnel evaluation — those are governed by district policy and human judgment.
